examples.title: Break Statement Example
examples.description: An example code demonstrating the usage of the break statement in a loop.
examples.explanation: The break statement is used to exit the loop when the condition i == 5 is met.

examples.title: Continue Statement Example
examples.description: An example code demonstrating the usage of the continue statement in a loop.
examples.explanation: The continue statement is used to skip the current iteration when the condition i == 5 is met.

examples.title: Break Statement Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode algorithm demonstrating the usage of the break statement in a loop.
examples.code:
LOOP i FROM 1 TO 10
    IF i == 5 THEN
        BREAK
    END IF
    PRINT i
END LOOP
examples.explanation: The break statement is used to exit the loop when the condition i == 5 is met.

examples.title: Continue Statement Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode algorithm demonstrating the usage of the continue statement in a loop.
examples.code:
LOOP i FROM 1 TO 10
    IF i == 5 THEN
        CONTINUE
    END IF
    PRINT i
END LOOP
examples.explanation: The continue statement is used to skip the current iteration when the condition i == 5 is met.
